use-geoip.tooltip: Determine location from your IP address (city-level accuracy, uses ip-api.com over HTTP). Falls back to the manual coordinates below when offline.

latitude.tooltip: Your geographic latitude in decimal degrees, e.g. 50.0875 for Prague

longitude.tooltip: Your geographic longitude in decimal degrees, e.g. 14.4214 for Prague

use-lst.description: Use Local Sidereal Time instead of civil time
use-lst.tooltip: Show local sidereal time in the dial center (the original behavior). When unchecked, the dial center shows civil time and the time zone options below apply to all displayed times.

use-auto-timezone.tooltip: Use the system time zone for all displayed times. Uncheck to pick a time zone manually.

timezone.tooltip: All times shown by the applet (panel and dial) use this time zone. The list is filled from the system time zone database at startup.

show-sunrise.description: Show the sun's next rise/set in the panel

show-both-sun.description: Always show both sunset and sunrise
show-both-sun.tooltip: Show the sun's rise and set stacked in two lines instead of only the soonest event.

show-moonrise.description: Show the moon's next rise/set in the panel

show-both-moon.description: Always show both moonset and moonrise
show-both-moon.tooltip: Show the moon's rise and set stacked in two lines instead of only the soonest event.

dial-size.tooltip: Diameter of the dial in the popup; larger values improve readability
